abilities.name: Incorporeal
abilities.description: Ignores other characters and terrain during movement. Reduce Ranged/Close Combat damage by half (rounded up).

abilities.name: Pure Nothingness
abilities.description: At end of each Dramatic Time round, suffer cumulative -1 Df (minimum 0).

abilities.name: Time is Meaningless
abilities.description: Gain ++ on all duels vs characters with Fast Condition.

actions: (1) Touch of the Void (Necromancy) | AV: 4 (10) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Wp | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage and becomes Slow.
(1) Phase Through (Athletics) | TN: 10 | Target moves up to 8 yards through terrain and other characters.
system.notes: Sentient nothingness given purpose by Tyrant Obliteration. Exist between dimensions. Only survive few hours before reality fills them in.
